name: operations-operations

states.name: Machine status tile
states.description: Voluntary 'what is each machine doing right now' broadcast surfaced from GET /coord/status (proxied via /coord-api/status) and live-updated through coord's WebSocket on the events.coord.machine_status_updated channel. The tile self-contains its WS subscription, debounced refetch, and 30s polling fallback — it does not depend on the parent FleetOverview's polling loop.

description: Operations page — cross-machine fleet view. Currently scoped to the Machine status tile (qontinui-coord Phase 6 Item 3 surface). The fleet/runners panels above predate spec coverage and are not asserted here.
